itemListElement.reviewBody:
The Annual Day Celebration was a truly memorable event, and we want to extend our heartfelt appreciation for the school's efforts in making it special.
The performance of the kids in the play was filled with energy and talent, captivating the audience and showcasing the incredible skills of all the participants. A special shout-out goes to the entire team of LVIS NOIDA, whose dedication and efforts in teaching and guiding the kids were evident throughout the event.
The celebration fostered a strong sense of community, bringing together students, parents, and faculty in a joyful display of creativity and hard work. With impeccable organization and delicious refreshments, the event highlighted the school’s commitment to providing enriching experiences.

"We eagerly look forward to what next year will bring!"

This Annual Day celebration was a blast! The Snowwhite theme was so wonderful that it has strong morals . We are really proud to be a part of this event..Thank you, LVIS, for nurturing my child's love for learning.The dedication of the teachers and staff is commendable.Your commitment to our child's development is invaluable.Impressed with the Co-Curricular activities organised by the school. This has helped my child to develop confidence and overcome stage fear.Our kids really enjoyed showing off their talents at the annual function. It was a great chance for them to shine..
The annual function showed us that the school cares about more than just academics. It's about the whole child. Thank u so much, Ms. Komal Mam(CT) & Vishika Mam, for being an excellent teacher. Your patience and dedication really helped my child succeed.

Meena khana M/O
Vanya khanna
2nd Bruce

Recently got a chance to witness the spectacular performances by our little ones on their  annual day . The efforts that the teachers had put through weeks of practices was evident in every moment on the stage. Teachers and kids together set the bar so high . It was way above what could usually be expected out of a Class 1 and Class 2 annual day. They broke all limitations of age 😊. Kids spoke, acted, danced and sang with such vigour and maturity ! With all the lights, backdrops, music and costumes, we were transported to the era of Fairy tales. A classic show of visual story telling. It was an absolute delight to watch them. Extremely proud !

The Annual Function 2024, conducted by Lotus Valley School was extremely well coordinated and beautifully presented. It shows the hard work and dedication of the teachers, mentors, children and rest of the staff members. My daughter Kiyaanshi Hemant Joshi is in Class 2 Bruce section and I would specially like to thank her respected class teacher Ms. Komal Arora for her exceptional support, love and guidance.
Best school I have ever seen, the faculty is professional and pays full attention to every minor details. I am glad to have my child in this school. Keep up the good progress!

Heartfelt Thanks for a Wonderful Annual Day!

Dear Lotus Valley International School Team,

Congratulations on the resounding success of the Annual Day program! Words can't express our admiration for the tremendous efforts put forth by the students, teachers, staff, and coordinators.

As proud parents of *Viaan Talwar from Class II Bruce*, we were particularly thrilled to see him shine as he played Grumpy in the play Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs. The confidence and stage exposure he gained, along with the remarkable talent displayed by all the children, made it a truly memorable event.

Each performance was a testament to the hard work and teamwork of everyone involved. We look forward to witnessing more such exceptional events in the future.

Thank you for this wonderful opportunity!

Yours sincerely,
Swati and Gagan Talwar

Strong Academics: Lotus Valley International School is known for its strong academics and its commitment to helping students succeed.

Extracurricular Activities: The school offers a wide range of extracurricular activities, which helps students develop their interests and talents outside of the classroom.

Great Infrastructure: The school has a beautiful and well-maintained campus, which provides a positive learning environment for students.

Supportive Community: The school has a strong sense of community, and parents feel that their children are well-supported by the teachers and staff.

I have been associated with Lotus Valley International school as an Occupational therapist for 5th academic session  now. School has a good working environment, skilled staff and supportive Management for the employees. I enjoy working with the children here in a positive environment with all the wonderful facilities provided and good infrastructure .It is a pleasure of being part of this school.

Excellent ambience and congenial environment.  Caring colleagues, supportive staff and lovely kids.Those that are in authority are reassuring, encouraging, cooperative and very helpful. Blessed to be a part of the LVIS family!

I have been associated with LVIS for more than six years now. The work culture and environment is just amazing. An  Excellent school with all modern facilities. Great infrastructure.  Focuses on holistic development of the child. Recommended to both teachers and students.
